translations.01KQXQV12BAKXPCSJ9SGD6530X: 无法加载 id 为 {conversation_id} 的会话
translations.01KQXQV1288SJMVDDXGZ9ABF09:
# Warp 启动配置
#
#
# 使用此文件来启动特定的窗口、标签页和窗格配置。
# 打开启动配置面板即可访问并打开任意启动配置。
#
# 本文件定义您的启动配置。
# 关于如何配置的更多信息请参阅：
# https://docs.warp.dev/terminal/sessions/launch-configurations
#
# 所有启动配置都存储在 {} 下。
# 您可以随时编辑它们！
#
# 您还可以像下面这样为启动配置添加在启动时运行的命令：
# ---
# name: Example with Command
# windows:
#  - tabs:
#      - layout:
#          cwd: /Users/warp-user/project
#          commands:
#            - exec: code .
translations.01KQXQV12J3BNJE8HKGJ2E487K: {} 个 Reload 额度已添加至您的 {}。

notes: agent_view.rs:158 -> show_error_toast format! arg, user-facing toast, translated, {conversation_id} preserved. alias_expansion.rs:45 -> InlineBannerTextButton.text UI button label, translated imperative. success_block.rs:159 -> build_header_row UI title; 'Warpified' coined verb, kept Warp brand, rendered '会话已 Warp 化'. user_config/mod.rs:27 -> LAUNCH_CONFIG_COMMENT written into user's launch config file & shown in editor (user-facing doc text); translated prose, preserved URL, {} placeholder, YAML keys/values (name/windows/tabs/layout/cwd/commands/exec, 'Example with Command') and exact newline shape incl trailing \n. bonus_grant_notification_model.rs:111 -> notification message format!; first {} = numeric credit count, second {} = English scope_text ('account'/'team'); kept positional order (number then scope), left second {} as English word in neutral Chinese context per contract S2; 'Reload' kept as feature name. hash.rs:154 & 220 -> both .expect('Buffer is sufficient for a SHA-256 hash') = panic_message. markdown.rs:736 -> anyhow .context('Failed to parse HTML bytes') diagnostic error annotation feeding error chain/log, not localized UI surface -> telemetry_payload. selection.rs:715 & 724 -> .expect(...) panic_message. repo_metadata lib.rs:179 -> .expect('CanonicalizedPath is always absolute') panic_message. escape_sequences.rs:136 -> .expect(...) multi-line assertion panic_message. winit/app.rs:235 -> .expect('Unable to run winit event loop') panic_message. drag_resize.rs:90 -> .expect('DragResizeState lock poisoned') panic_message. platform/mod.rs:749 -> 'DirectX 12' graphics backend label from to_label(), one of DirectX 12/Vulkan/OpenGL/Metal/WebGPU; proper graphics-API product/identifier name kept English via protocol_key.
